things.name: Vasa Museum
things.description: Extraordinary 17th-century warship preserved almost intact, the world's most visited museum ship

things.name: Gamla Stan (Old Town)
things.description: Medieval island city with cobbled streets, the Royal Palace and Nobel Prize Museum

things.name: ABBA Museum
things.description: Interactive museum celebrating ABBA with costumes, instruments and recording studios

things.name: Djurgarden Island
things.description: Green museum island with Skansen, Vasa, ABBA and Tivoli Grona Lund

things.name: Skansen Open Air Museum
things.description: World's first open-air museum with 150 historic buildings and Sweden's oldest zoo

things.name: Royal Palace (Kungliga Slottet)
things.description: One of Europe's largest palaces still in official use with treasury and royal apartments

things.name: Fotografiska
things.description: World-leading photography museum with rotating major exhibitions and rooftop views

things.name: Moderna Museet
things.description: Outstanding collection of 20th and 21st century art on Skeppsholmen island

things.name: Drottningholm Palace
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage royal palace on Lake Malaren with a preserved 18th-century theatre

things.name: Stockholm Archipelago
things.description: 30,000 islands within easy reach by ferry for a classic Swedish summer experience
